name: Land Beyond the Noisy World
desc: Isolated from Persean conflicts, self-sufficient with rare visitors. No strategic value for invasion.

name: Titan's Ascent
desc: Gigantic, hostile Titan-like creatures roam the planet's jungles, crushing infrastructure and hopes of colonization.

name: Abyssal Dread
desc: Unfathomable leviathans lurk in the oceans, spreading terror and chaos to all who venture here.

name: Dark World Remnants
desc: A society of hostile Dark World exiles, innately aggressive and xenophobic towards humans.

name: Realm of Rifts
desc: A paradisiacal world that rejects all life daring to tread upon it...

name: Titan's Ally
desc: After forging bonds with the Titans, they now aid in repelling invaders... for their amusement.

name: Leviathan's Aid
desc: With the leviathans' assistance, oceanic conquest becomes trivial. Resources flow swiftly where needed.
